Definition: The problem of overfitting is when the model 
captures the noise in the training data instead of the 
underlying structure 
Overfitting can occur in all the models weвҖҷve seen so far: 
вҖ“ Decision Trees (e.g. when tree is too deep)
вҖ“ KNN (e.g. when k is small)
